title: On the Cave of the Nymphs
description: Porphyry interprets the cave in Odyssey 13 as an allegory for the soul's descent into matter and return to the divine.
introduction: Porphyry interprets the cave in Odyssey 13 as an allegory for the soul's descent into matter and return to the divine.

translation.text: The cave of the nymphs is a symbol of the cosmos. The souls descend through the northern gate and ascend through the southern.
